name: Elarion
description: A luminous realm where forests are made of living crystals and beings communicate through frequencies of color. Once pure, the light fractured during the Red Eclipse, birthing zones called Shadow Groves.

visual.style_prompt: epic fantasy, crystalline forests, bioluminescent flowers, rivers of liquid light, ethereal beings of color, cinematic lighting, painterly

rules: Light is sentient and carries thought
Shadow Groves corrupt light into mimicry
